name: uninus-greenhouse-rollup
description: Home Assistant integration and Lovelace card for remembered timed greenhouse roll-up covers

scripts.test:python: uv run --with homeassistant==2026.7.2 python -m unittest discover -s tests_python -v
scripts.check: npm test && npm run test:python && npm run build && node --check uninus-greenhouse-rollup-card.js
